description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade includes a large garage door, a recessed entryway, and a mix of white and wood-textured panels, complemented by a small landscaped area with plants. The sides and rear of the house are more minimal, with a few rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically. The roof is composed of multiple flat planes at varying heights, creating a dynamic, stepped appearance. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with some wood or composite panel accents. Overall, the house exudes a contemporary urban aesthetic, suitable for a high-density residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a boxy design, large garage, and wood-accented entryway. Clean lines and minimal window arrangements give it a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, recessed entryway, wood accent panel, and small landscaped area.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal detailing, showing a few rectangular windows and the stepped flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the geometric, multi-level flat roof and plain back wall with no visible entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows and the continuation of the flat, stepped roof design.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a flat overhang, large modern door, wood accent panel, and adjacent garage door
